PETITION FOR FORFEITURE FILED BY PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA AS TO RESPONDENT PROPERTY SUBJECT TO DISPOSITION: $747.00 U.S. CURRENCY DOES 1-100, INCLUSIVE JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

DISCOVERY 612, NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA'S MOTION TO COMPEL ANSWERS TO PETITIONER'S FIRST SET OF DEMAND FOR PRODUCTION AND INSPECTION OF DOCUMENTS, PETITIONER'S FIRST SET OF SPECIAL INTERROGATORIES, JUDICIAL COUNCIL FORM INTERROGATORIES IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION HAS BEEN FILED. RESPONDENT IS ORDERED TO RESPOND WITHIN 15 DAYS OF NOTICE OF THIS ORDER. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. MATTER NOT REPORTED.

DISCOVERY 612, PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA'S MOTION FOR ORDER FOR TERMINATING SANCTIONS AND STRIKING CLAIM. MOTION IS GRANTED PURSUANT TO CODE OF CIVIL PROCEDURE SECTIONS 2023.010(D), 2023.290(C), AND 2031.300 (C). JUDGE: MONICA F. WILEY. MATTER NOT REPORTED

Off Calendar Jul-29-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: Petitioner People of the State of California's Motion To Compel Answers To Petitioner's First Set Of Demand For Production And Inspection Of Documents, Petitioner's First Set Of Special Interrogatories, Judicial Council Form Interrogatories is granted. No opposition has been filed. Respondent is ordered to respond within 15 days of notice of this order. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. MATTER NOT REPORTED.
